title: actiotypes.js — UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN string value renamed + SESSION_EXPIRED action added
commit_message: refactor: rename UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN string to REFRESH_TOKEN_UPDATE; add SESSION_EXPIRED action type

why_cascade.explanation: actiotypes.js is a shared action-type constants file imported by every reducer. Changing one value (UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN) causes ALL tests whose sources[] include actiotypes.js to be selected — even if they don't directly test UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN. This is the 'shared constants file cascade' pattern.

UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN renamed: CRITICAL → feature/user-profile.feature.test.js (userDetailsReducer describe has UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN in symbols)
HIGH    → feature/user-profile.feature.test.js  (all other userDetailsReducer + profileReducer tests with actiotypes.js in sources)
HIGH    → feature/favourites-watchlist.feature.test.js (all tests with actiotypes.js in sources)
SESSION_EXPIRED added: GAP reported — no describe('SESSION_EXPIRED') found in test-manifest.json

why_cascade.key_runtime_failure: userDetailsReducer dispatches action type 'UPDATE_REFRESHED_TOKEN'. After rename, the reducer will no longer respond to that type. The test 'UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN updates token and loginTime independently' will FAIL because the reducer returns unchanged state.

CRITICAL.reason: symbols[] contains 'UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN' which is the directly renamed symbol

tests.test: userDetailsReducer > UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN updates token and loginTime independently
tests.why: symbols = ['userDetailsReducer', 'UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN']; UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN is the renamed symbol
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — reducer still uses old string 'UPDATE_REFRESHED_TOKEN' as switch case; dispatch with new value is a no-op

HIGH.reason: actiotypes.js in sources[] — shared dependency changed; all co-dependent reducer tests defensively selected

tests.test: userDetailsReducer > initialises with data as an empty array
userDetailsReducer > SUCCESS action populates data and token from the payload
userDetailsReducer > ONAUTHENTICATE resets profileAuthSuccess to false
userDetailsReducer > SHOWLOGGEDOUTSHEET stores the payload in showLoggedOutSheet
userDetailsReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action type
tests.why: sources = [userDetailsReducer.js] only — but same suite file has CRITICAL test; conservative inclusion

tests.test: profileReducer > initialises with an empty profileData array
profileReducer > PROFILESDETAILS action replaces profileData with the new list
profileReducer > SAVESELECTEDPROFILEDETAILS stores the chosen profile
profileReducer > returns current state unchanged for an unrecognised action
tests.why: sources = [profileReducer.js] only — same suite file conservative inclusion

tests.test: favouritesReducer > starts with an empty userFavourites list
favouritesReducer > UPDATEALLFAVOURITIESDETAILS replaces the favourites list
favouritesReducer > sets favouritesFetched to true once the list is loaded
favouritesReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action
toastReducer > initialises with showToast as null
toastReducer > TOAST action stores the toast message in showToast
toastReducer > resets showToast to null when null is dispatched
toastReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action

SKIP.reason: actiotypes.js not in sources[] for these test files
SKIP.note: All 4 non-feature suites skipped — actiotypes.js is a pure feature-layer concern

coverage_gaps.explanation: The string value 'UPDATE_REFRESHED_TOKEN' is what reducers match in switch/case. After rename, any dispatched UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN action will not match the old case string in the reducer unless the reducer is also updated.
coverage_gaps.action_required: Update the switch-case in userDetailsReducer.js: case 'REFRESH_TOKEN_UPDATE' (or import UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN constant — do not hardcode string)

coverage_gaps.detail: SESSION_EXPIRED action type added — no reducer handles it yet, and no test covers it
recommended_tests: userDetailsReducer > SESSION_EXPIRED action clears user session data
toastReducer > SESSION_EXPIRED action shows a session expiry toast

selection_proof.key_point: Only FEATURE tests selected. Zero standalone or cross-dependent. The cascade is entirely within the feature layer — actiotypes.js is a pure feature-reducer concern.
